To get your token:
1. Open Glide and go to the **Data** editor.
2. Open a Big Table and click **Show API**.
3. Copy the **secret token** shown in the API details.
4. Paste it below.

This piece uses Glide's Big Tables API, so the available actions work with Big Tables only.
Add one or more rows to a Glide Big Tabl: Add one or more rows to a Glide Big Table.
Retrieve rows from a Glide Big Table.
Update an existing row in a Glide Big Ta: Update an existing row in a Glide Big Table.
Delete a row from a Glide Big Table.
List the Glide Big Tables available to t: List the Glide Big Tables available to the authenticated team.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Select the Glide Big Table to use.
Provide an array of JSON objects where e: Provide an array of JSON objects where each object matches the Glide table columns.
Maximum number of rows to return.
The Glide row ID to update.
Provide a JSON object containing only th: Provide a JSON object containing only the columns you want to update.
The Glide row ID to delete.
